headline: VeriSign (VRSN) Q1 2026 Earnings Transcript
summary: Jim Bidzos: Thank you, David.  The combined .com and .net domain name base is now at a record 176.1 million names.  New registrations are the largest we have seen since 2021, combined with very strong renewal rates.

raw.headline: VeriSign (VRSN) Q1 2026 Earnings Transcript
raw.summary: Jim Bidzos: Thank you, David.  The combined .com and .net domain name base is now at a record 176.1 million names.  New registrations are the largest we have seen since 2021, combined with very strong renewal rates.

headline: DNIB.com Reports Internet Has 392.5 Million Domain Name Registrations at the End of the First Quarter of 2026
summary: RESTON, Va., April 23, 2026--VeriSign, Inc. (NASDAQ: VRSN), a global provider of critical internet infrastructure and domain name registry services, today announced that, according to the latest Domain Name Industry Brief Quarterly Report from DNIB.com, the first quarter of 2026 closed with 392.5 million domain name registrations across all top-level domains (TLDs), an increase of 5.6 million domain name registrations, or 1.4% compared to the fourth quarter of 2025. headline: Verisign Beats Q1 Estimates and Guides Higher Amid Domain Registration Surge (NASDAQ:VRSN)
summary: Verisign beats Q1 estimates with $2.34 EPS, revenue up 6.6%, driven by surging domain registrations. Announces .com price hike to $10.97, boosting future outlook.

headline: Intel’s $240 Billion Rally Slams Into a Potential Earnings Wall
summary: (Bloomberg) -- Intel Corp. has been one of the hottest stocks in the market over the past 12 months, soaring 235% to the highest price since the dot-com bubble. But the rally is facing a potential roadblock in the company’s first-quarter earnings report due after the close Thursday.
